title: Sequential ingest, no workers
rationale: USE_WORKER_INGEST: false. Worker pool scaffold exists but IDB-in-worker not validated. Sequential ingestTree() builder with YAML sidecar support.

title: $state.raw for vault store
rationale: No deep proxy for vault — performance on large normalized entity maps (10K+ canvases). Svelte 5 $state() creates deep proxies which are too costly.

title: Two-tier data model: IIIF Content Layer + Workspace Layer
rationale: Vault holds portable IIIF (Manifests, Canvases, Annotations, Ranges). IDB holds app-specific workspace state (board positions, view prefs, filters, snapshots). Both durable, only IIIF is portable. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md D18/C3.

title: Undo scope: vault mutations only
rationale: View state and selection excluded from undo. Industry consensus from Figma, Photoshop, VS Code, Google Docs. Separate navigation stack (Alt+Left/Right) for 'go back to where I was'.

title: ViewBus: per-view stores with shared ViewStateProvider protocol
rationale: Central ViewRegistry singleton holds per-view store instances. Each implements ViewStateProvider (selection, filters, getSnapshot, restoreSnapshot). Not a monolithic store — views own their state shape. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md A1/D1.

title: Selection model: two-layer with central resolver
rationale: Layer 1: typed raw selections (entities, spatial, temporal, query) per source view. Layer 2: central resolver computes AND intersection as resolved Set<string>. Crossfilter model. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md A2/D2.

title: Board persistence: two-tier IIIF + Workspace
rationale: Tier 1 IIIF: narrative paths → Range behavior:sequence, connections → Annotation motivation:linking. Tier 2 Workspace: board positions, connection geometry, link styles in IDB. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md A3/D3.

title: Relationship model: linking annotations, not new entity type
rationale: Entity-to-entity relationships stored as Annotations with motivation:linking and two targets. Reuses existing annotation CRUD, search indexing, IIIF export. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md C5/D19.

title: navPlace pipeline: GeoJSON first, metadata fallback
rationale: MapStore must read canvas.navPlace GeoJSON via navPlaceService before falling back to metadata string parsing. New UPDATE_NAV_PLACE action needed. See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md C6/D20.

title: Content State: spec-compliant only, separate workspace state
rationale: IIIF Content State for interop (manifest+canvas+selectors). Workspace State format for full view restoration (active view, filters, zoom, panel config). See DESIGN_DECISIONS.md A4/D9.

title: ESLint custom rules cover molecules AND organisms
rationale: no-native-html-in-molecules extended to organisms. 18 custom rules in eslint-rules/. Atom reuse enforced (Select, TextArea, RangeInput) in both layers.

title: ViewBus → ViewRegistry
rationale: Per-view stores with ViewStateProvider protocol + central ViewRegistry singleton. Not an event bus — registry persists state across mount/unmount. Vega-Lite signals + QGIS layer model precedent.

title: Two-layer selection model
rationale: Layer 1: typed raw selections (entities/spatial/temporal/query) with view provenance. Layer 2: resolved Set<string> via central AND resolver. Crossfilter + Vega-Lite intersect precedent.

title: Two-tier data model (IIIF + Workspace)
rationale: IIIF Content Layer (vault, portable) for manifests/canvases/annotations/ranges. Workspace Layer (IDB) for board positions, view preferences, vocabulary defs, embeddings. Both durable, only IIIF is portable. Mirador precedent.

title: Content State: spec-compliant only
rationale: IIIF Content State encodes manifest+canvas+selectors only. Separate Workspace State format for full view restoration (filters, zoom, panels, board layout). Bridge: WorkspaceState.toContentState() extracts IIIF subset.

title: Annotation interaction: explicit mode switch
rationale: One-shot default (auto-return to pan after one annotation). Shift+drag accelerator for quick rectangle. Keep-tool toggle for batch. Scroll always zooms. Matches Mirador, Annotorious, Acrobat.

title: Vocabulary: three-layer progressive formalization
rationale: Free tags (autocomplete) → consolidated (merge/rename synonyms) → controlled mapping (SKOS match types to authority terms). Tags stored as W3C annotations with motivation:tagging. Partially-mapped datasets always valid.

title: Storage lifecycle: three-tier
rationale: Hot (memory , ~5MB active manifest) / Warm (IDB, ~50MB all metadata+embeddings+snapshots) / Cold (OPFS, ~200MB-4GB image tiles LRU). Working set pattern (Figma model): load active manifest canvases in full, others as stubs. Safari 7-day eviction mitigated with navigator.storage.persist().

name: ViewStateProvider mount lifecycle
description: Provider created in ViewRouter (not in view component). Persists across view unmount/remount. Component reads from registry via viewRegistry.get(viewId). Seed from localStorage only on first mount when still at default.

title: U9 resolved: IIIF bridge round-trip sufficient for board persistence
rationale: Spike confirmed boardStateToManifest/manifestToBoardState round-trips all structurally important state (items, connections, groups, viewport, z-order) losslessly. Lost fields are either workspace-only (gridSize, snapEnabled -- needs small BoardWorkspaceState store) or runtime-derivable (blobUrl, isMetadataNode). Minor lossy: sub-pixel rounding (acceptable), note label truncation to 50 chars (full text in annotation field), connection custom labels overwritten by type labels (one-line fix if needed). Two divergent type systems (model vs store) must be reconciled in B7. Bridge is ready to wire into vault dispatch.

content: V5: Tile pipeline deleted (tilePipeline.ts, tileWorker.ts, imagePipeline.svelte.ts, image-pipeline.ts). SW keeps LRU cache for IIIF image handler, adds /tiles/ 301 redirect. IDB orphan cleanup via deleteOrphanedTileDatabase() in storage.ts.

V6: ValidationIssue discriminated union (kind:'tree'|'field'). TreeValidationIssue for structural, FieldValidationIssue for inspector. .level→.severity everywhere. Deprecated ValidatorIssue/InspectorIssue aliases removed. Module-local ValidationIssue aliases kept non-exported except inspectorValidation.ts (feature-internal consumers).

Rect.union takes readonly Rect[] array, not rest params — use GeoRect.union(items) not reduce with GeoRect.union(acc, item). Board-design has two BoardItem types: model/index.ts uses w/h, stores/boardVault.svelte.ts uses width/height — geometry Rect is compatible only with the latter.

title: BoardItem w/h → width/height unification
rationale: Model BoardItem size fields renamed from w/h to width/height for Rect interface compatibility. Two BoardItem types remain (model vs vault) — separate concerns, both now Rect-compatible. Geometry primitives wired across all board-design files (wave 3).

description: analyze-imports.ts @/ alias resolution bug: hardcoded defaults overwrote tsconfig.json @/*→./* mapping with @/→src/, causing @/src/shared/... to resolve to src/src/shared/... (miss)
resolution: Removed hardcoded defaults, added longest-prefix-first alias matching, added .svelte to tracked extensions. Impact: 241→600 files, 86→43 orphans, 189→1953 edges.

name: Coupling analysis docs
description: 3 coupling analysis docs at docs/active/coupling-{domain,subsystem,concern}.md generated from 600-file dependency graph. Key findings: vault is god-store (21 deps, 10 features), storage.ts has 9 deps, zero hub files, 31 atom→molecule misclassifications, 4 widget→feature FSD violations, export feature hardest to isolate (0% type coupling). Storage shaping docs P1-P4 enhanced with these findings.

name: health-rubric
description: scripts/health-rubric.ts scores 7 dimensions (coupling, deadCode, circularDeps, fsdBoundaries, importDepth, barrelHealth, complexity) from dependencies.json. Outputs public/health-scorecard.json + health-report.md. Runs in post-commit hook after analyze-imports.ts. Each dimension is a pure function (graph) => DimensionResult with 0-100 score, grade (green/yellow/red), weight, metrics, flags.

content: Scripts that are both CLI-runnable and test-importable: dynamically import fileURLToPath inside main(), guard main() with process.argv[1] check. happy-dom doesn't support fileURLToPath at module scope.
